scripts.dev: echo "@yurbrain/client is a library package (no runtime dev server)"
scripts.start: echo "@yurbrain/client is consumed by app packages"
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit --target ES2022 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --jsx react-jsx --strict --skipLibCheck src/index.ts
scripts.build: echo "@yurbrain/client is source-consumed in the monorepo; no package build artifact is emitted"
